headline: GDDY Q1 Deep Dive: AI-Native Products and Customer Quality Drive Margin Expansion
summary: Domain registrar and web services company GoDaddy (NYSE:GDDY) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 6.1% year on year to $1.27 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $1.30 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.05 per share was 2.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
